## 📋 Description

Please include a summary of the change or the new tool being documented. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number if applicable)

## 🛠️ Type of change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue with commands/formatting)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (adding documentation for a completely new tool)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (improving wording, adding new use-cases or interview questions)

## ✔️ PR Checklist

Before you submit this PR, please check all the boxes below:

- [ ] My code follows the `CONTRIBUTING.md` style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have properly structured my `.md` file in the `/tools/` directory
- [ ] I have NOT removed any mandatory sections from the 16-point template
- [ ] I have verified all CLI commands detailed in my documentation actually work
- [ ] I have added my new tool to the Index Table in the main `README.md`
- [ ] I have used appropriate formatting (Emojis, Tables, Code Blocks)
